title: Behavior in 8.0 differs from 5.7
poc: insert into t select if(a, 1, 0) from t1;
key_bug_features: No warnings or errors in MySQL 8.0 execution
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_table1(id INT PRIMARY KEY, name VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL);
CREATE TABLE test_table2(id INT, description TEXT DEFAULT NULL);
INSERT INTO test_table2 SELECT id, IF(name IS NULL, 'No Name', name) FROM test_table1;
SELECT IFNULL(MAX(id), 0) FROM test_table1 WHERE name LIKE 'Sample%';
